summary: Iteration 64 - Frontend UI/UX Testing for Vehicle Listing & Booking Interface Phase 1 Overhaul. All features verified working: 3-column grid layout, premium vehicle cards with contain images, European-style plate badges, status badges, brand/model info, search, filters, Add Vehicle Modal with smart brand/model dropdowns, Edit Vehicle Modal.

issues: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' - Minor React Native Web warning, does not affect functionality
Console warning: 'A component is changing an uncontrolled input to be controlled' - Minor React warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VehicleCard.tsx: Premium card design implemented correctly with contain images (resizeMode='contain'), European-style plate badges with blue country stripe, status badges, brand in purple, large bold model names
vehicles.tsx: 3-column grid on desktop (width >= 1200), 2-column on tablet, 1-column on mobile. Search filters by name, plate, type. Status filter tabs with counts working correctly
NewVehicleModal.tsx: Smart brand/model dropdowns working - selecting a brand shows its specific models. Brand search filters the brand list. 26 brands with predefined models available
All data-testid attributes present: vehicle-card-{id}, vehicle-search, filter-{status}, add-vehicle-btn, brand-dropdown, model-dropdown, edit-vehicle-{id}
Minor console warnings present but do not affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vehicle Listing UI/UX overhaul Phase 1 complete. All features working: 7 vehicles displayed in 3-column grid, premium cards with contain images, European plate badges, status badges (Disponible/Loue/Maintenance), brand names in purple, large bold model names, CHF X/jour pricing, feature tags (seats/transmission/fuel), 'Voir les details' buttons. Search and filter tabs working. Add Vehicle Modal has smart brand/model dropdowns with 26 brands. Edit Vehicle Modal shows full vehicle details.

vehicles_page.search_bar: PASS - Search by name, plate, type working

status_filters.maintenance_filter: PASS - Shows 1 vehicle (Range Rover Evoque P250)

vehicle_cards.image_contain_mode: PASS - Images use resizeMode='contain' with dark background
vehicle_cards.status_badge: PASS - Green 'Disponible' badge on available vehicles, red 'Maintenance' on maintenance
vehicle_cards.brand_purple: PASS - Brand names (BMW, MERCEDES-BENZ, TESLA, etc.) in purple uppercase
vehicle_cards.model_large_bold: PASS - Model names in large bold text (Serie 3 320d, Classe C 200, etc.)
vehicle_cards.european_plate_badge: PASS - Dark badge with blue country stripe (GE 100 001, GE 200 002, etc.)
vehicle_cards.price_display: PASS - 'CHF X/jour' format (CHF 120, CHF 150, CHF 200, etc.)
vehicle_cards.voir_details_button: PASS - Purple 'Voir les details' button with arrow

add_vehicle_modal.brand_dropdown: PASS - Shows 26 brands with model counts
add_vehicle_modal.model_dropdown: PASS - Shows brand-specific models after brand selection
add_vehicle_modal.smart_dropdowns: PASS - Model choices change based on brand selection

edit_vehicle_modal.modal_opens: PASS - Opens on 'Voir les details' click
edit_vehicle_modal.shows_vehicle_details: PASS - Displays brand, model, year, price, plate, color, chassis, type, transmission, fuel, description, photos

search_functionality.search_by_brand: PASS - Searching 'BMW' shows only BMW vehicle
search_functionality.search_by_plate: PASS - Search filters by plate number
search_functionality.clear_search: PASS - Clearing search shows all vehicles

playwright_tests_performed: Verify page header and vehicle count
Test status filter tabs (Tous, Disponible, Loue, Maintenance)
Open Add Vehicle Modal and test brand dropdown
Verify model dropdown appears after brand selection
Open Edit Vehicle Modal via 'Voir les details' button
Verify edit modal shows vehicle details
